title: 30o: blob module split transport vs JMAP method
description: Blob transport (HTTP upload/download per RFC 8620 §6.1-6.2) lives in src/blob.rs, while the JMAP Blob/lookup method (draft-ietf-jmap-blobext-01 §6) lives in methods/blob.rs. This mirrors the architectural boundary between raw HTTP blob I/O (which bypasses the JMAP method-call layer entirely and talks directly to a URL template) and structured JMAP method dispatch (which goes through JmapRequest/JmapResponse). Mixing them would obscure that upload/download are not JMAP method calls and would make it harder to swap or mock one layer independently.
close_reason: decision record: transport/JMAP split is correct architecture
